text: Roof inspection findings: moderate granule loss on south-facing slope; flashing at chimney shows separation and prior patch work. Recommend licensed roofer evaluation within 30 days. No active leak observed in attic at time of inspection.
HVAC scope — Vendor A: replace air handler, new duct sealing, 10-year parts warranty. Vendor B: coil cleaning only, no warranty on labor. Mechanical rough-in per IRC Chapter 15.

Delaware residential code excerpt: roof coverings shall be installed per manufacturer instructions. Flashing required at all roof penetrations. Work shall comply with current adopted IRC with state amendments.
